candidates.why: Separate operating D&A summary line, but it is not labelled as COGS/cost of sales and appears to cover broader operating D&A rather than a COGS-specific amount.
Operating depreciation component, but not identified as belonging to cost of sales; no explicit COGS-specific D&A row is shown.
Operating amortisation component, but not identified as COGS-related; appears to be part of overall operating D&A.

variables.notes: Selected COGS bucket is only 'Cost of sales'. No explicit D&A row is labelled as being in cost of sales / COGS. The visible D&A rows appear as separate operating lines at a broader level, so there is insufficient evidence to add any row specifically to COGS without risking misallocation or double counting.

candidates.why: Explicit separate operating D&A summary line at the same level as the selected overhead rows. Earlier XSGA selection explicitly excluded depreciation/amortization, so this row appears outside the selected XSGA_COMPONENTS bucket and is the best summary row to add separately.

Explicit R&D amortisation row. Since XRD is empty and there is no separate R&D expense row selected above operating profit, this could be added to XSGA_DA as a special-case R&D D&A item if the total D&A row is not used.
Component of the total D&A line. Should not be chosen if the summary row 'Depreciation and amortization' is selected, to avoid double counting.
Component of total D&A rather than a separate preferred summary for SG&A-related D&A.

variables.notes: The selected XSGA_COMPONENTS rows are 'Other external cost', 'Personnel costs', and 'Other operating expenses', and the prior notes explicitly excluded depreciation/amortization. The statement then shows a separate operating-level summary row 'Depreciation and amortization', so it appears to sit outside the selected XSGA bucket and should be added separately. Manual review is flagged because the summary row may include some non-SG&A operating D&A (for example any production/COGS-related depreciation), and the excerpt does not provide a clean bucket split.
